results.title: AI Full Stack Engineer - VibeCodeCareers
highlights:
On-site in Boise, Idaho, this mid-level role at Micron Technology involves developing AI-powered applications. The company leads in memory and storage solutions, focusing on transforming information into intelligence.
...
This role is ideal for developers who leverage AI tools like custom agents and Model Context Protocol to build scalable systems. It emphasizes AI in both development workflows and production systems, requiring skills in vibe coding and prompt engineering.
...
You'll design and integrate AI-driven solutions, focusing on automating routine tasks and embedding intelligence into workflows. Your work includes building custom AI agents, managing system architectures, and ensuring reliable, production-grade software.
...
We are seeking an experienced AI Full Stack Engineer to build modern applications where AI is a first-class capability—both in the development workflow and in production systems. This role focuses on designing and integrating AI-powered solutions using custom agents, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and scalable software engineering practices to accelerate development and deliver reliable, production-grade systems. Our team needs additional support to scale with the increased SMAI Data Science footprint and expand software support for Technology Development workflows and AI enablement.
...
We are looking for an AI Full Stack Engineer who builds modern applications using AI as a first-class capability—both as part of the development workflow and the systems we ship. This role goes beyond simply using AI coding assistants. It requires strong understanding of advanced timely creation, vibe scripting, Rework Rate Reduction, and applying Custom Agents with integrations built around MCP or equivalent experience. The goal is to significantly shorten development and feedback cycles by automating routine engineering work, augmenting human decision-making, and embedding intelligence into development workflows and delivered applications.
...
Build and implement Custom AI Agents to support workflows like task automation, decision support, summarization, multi-step reasoning, and guided execution. Show proficiency in timely engineering and Vibe Coding prototypes.
...
Build and integrate systems using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to enable structured context sharing between models, tools, and agents, tool and capability exposure to LLM‑based agents, and interoperability across AI components without hard‑coded integrations
...
Integrate applications with external and internal AI services (LLMs, embeddings, search, tools) via well‑designed APIs, and harden AI components for 24×7 critical physical manufacturing systems with attention to reliability, resiliency, latency, performance, security, permissions, data boundaries, observability, and maintainability while applying retrieval‑augmented generation (RAG) systems
...
Use AI‑assisted tools to accelerate development (code generation, refactoring, test creation, documentation), critically evaluate and refine AI‑generated output, and apply human judgment to architecture, correctness, and long‑term maintainability
...
Experience designing and implementing Custom AI agents beyond simple chat interfaces, including developing skills for custom agents
...
AI‑native skills such as Prompt Engineering, Vibe Coding, context window management, and chain‑of‑thought design
...
Experience integrating systems using MCP or equivalent structured agent/tool interfaces and strong understanding of prompt design and tool invocation
...
and hands‑on experience integrating RAG‑based systems
...
Experience applying AI‑enabled development practices to accelerate engineering workflows and improve productivity
...
Demonstrated ability to critically evaluate AI‑generated outputs and refine them for production‑grade systems
...
Experience building interoperable AI systems without hard‑coded integrations
...
AI Full Stack Engineer

# Data Scientist

Employer: Micron Technology, Inc. Job Title: Data ScientistJob Requisition: JR103250Job Location: Boise, IdahoJob Type: Full TimeRate of Pay: $177,696.01 per year
...
Duties: Analyze and interpret large datasets to identify trends and insights that support business decisions. Build and validate time series forecasting and statistical models to improve business planning accuracy. Develop data pipelines and analytical workflows from data collection to visualization using SQL, Python, and cloud-based tools. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into data-driven solutions. Support automation and optimization initiatives by applying machine learning and advanced analytics techniques. Present analytical findings and model results to stakeholders in a clear and actionable manner. May telecommute.
...
Requirements: Employer will accept a Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Operations Research, Information Systems or related field and 2 years of experience in the job offered or related occupation.
...
Position requires:
...
1. Statistical methods, data modeling, and time series forecasting

2. Python and SQL for data extraction and analysis

3. Data visualization and reporting tools: Power BI, Tableau, or Excel

4. Data processing and automation techniques

5. Data Platforms & Warehouses: SQL Server, MySQL, Oracle, or Snowflake
...
Contact: To apply, visit Micron.com/Careers. Search by requisition no. JR103250.

results.title: Kartheek Sirugudi
highlights:
Staff Machine Learning Engineer | Generative AI |AI Agents| RAG|Gemini| ADK| GCP| LLMs, LangChain, Vertex AI | FastAPI & Cloud Deployment
...
Staff Machine Learning Engineer at [Micron Technology](https://www.linkedin.com/company/micron-technology)
...
My journey into Machine Learning began in 2019 while mentoring interns in India. Through those interactions, I saw how AI could transform real-world problems. Fueled by that passion, I pursued a Master’s in Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence at the University of Texas at Dallas, laying the foundation for the next chapter of my career. Today, I am a Senior Machine Learning Engineer with 12+ years of experience across software engineering, AI, and cloud technologies, now specializing in Generative AI and Agentic AI systems. 🔹 Core Expertise • Generative AI & LLMs: Gemini 2.5 Pro, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), conversational agents, LangChain, LangGraph • Agentic AI Tools: FastMCP, Google AI SDK, MCP servers — building intelligent autonomous agents with structured reasoning, tool-use, and orchestration pipelines • Backend & MLOps: FastAPI, PyTorch, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, scalable ML deployments (Vertex AI, GCP, GKE, Dataflow, OpenShift, Apache Beam) • Full-Stack & Frontend: TypeScript, React, Next.js — integrating AI APIs and agentic components into production-ready web apps • Projects & Impact: Designed real-time conversational AI systems, built custom RAG-powered agents, and deployed cloud-native AI applications delivering business value Beyond technical expertise, I’m passionate about bridging AI research with practical business impact — creating solutions that are not just innovative but production-ready, scalable, and agent-driven. 💡 Always learning, always building — and excited about the next wave of agentic AI tools that are redefining how humans and AI collaborate. 📩 Open to Machine Learning Engineer / Generative AI Engineer / Agentic AI Engineer opportunities. Contact: 2kartheek10@gmail.com
...
### [Micron Technology
...
.linkedin.
...
#### Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Current)
...
Built multiple LLM-based intelligent agents using CrewAI and Google Gemini models, including a Confluence reader agent, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) agent, document summarizer, and an Ops agent. Designed and implemented a centralized Documentation Hub using MkDocs, integrating project documentation from Bitbucket’s workspace. Improved knowledge retrieval, document summarization, and operational efficiency across teams by leveraging advanced LLM capabilities. Advanced Predictive Modeling and Data Drift Monitoring Developed predictive models using Linear Regression and XGBoost to forecast wafer-level reliability scores. Implemented a robust data drift monitoring system to ensure consistent and reliable model performance over time. ETL Pipeline Development with PySpark and Cloud Composer Designed scalable ETL pipelines using Dataproc clusters and PySpark to extract and preprocess wafer data from Trevni JATs. Scheduled daily and weekly ETL jobs with Cloud Composer DAGs, improving data flow, decision-making speed, and data quality. Model Containerization and Deployment on Vertex AI Containerized machine learning models for scalable training and inference using Vertex AI. Reduced VTC trimming time from 5 minutes to 2 minutes and proving time from 71 minutes to 68 minutes, saving ~$400K in CAPEX and accelerating product development cycles. ProbEMD Framework – Unified Model Deployment and Management Developed the ProbEMD framework for scalable ML model deployment across Cloud Run, GKE, and OpenShift environments. Streamlined project and model management with the ProbEMD UI, improving operational efficiency and scaling capabilities. Image Defect Detection with Vertex AI and PyTorch Built a GPU-accelerated defect detection model using Vertex AI and PyTorch, improving early wafer defect identification and quality control.

results.title: Films Process Development Engineer | Jobflarely
highlights:
Films Process Development Engineer | Jobflarely
...
# Films Process Development Engineer
...
Posted Jun 23, 2026
...
JR100105 Films Process Development Engineer
...
Micron Technology is a world leader in innovating memory and storage solutions that accelerate the transformation of information into intelligence, inspiring the world to learn, communicate and advance faster than ever.
...
We are part of Micron’s Technology Development Group, where we turn advanced materials into manufacturable memory technology. Our thin films teams work at the groundbreaking edge of DRAM scaling, partnering across R&D, manufacturing, and suppliers to enable future nodes. We operate in a fast paced, hands‑on environment where strong fundamentals and execution matter!
...
As a Thin Films Engineer, you will develop and integrate deposition processes that directly enable Micron’s next-generation DRAM! This role owns thin film concepts from early development through high‑volume manufacturing, with a strong focus on EUV patterning films. You will work closely with multi-functional teams and external partners to deliver robust, scalable processes that meet aggressive technology requirements.
...
### Responsibilities:
...
- Develop, optimize, and transfer thin film deposition processes for EUV‑enabled DRAM technology
- Lead process characterization, troubleshooting, and defect reduction through VME
- Drive thin film roadmap activities aligned to future technology nodes
- Collaborate with internal teams and suppliers to mature equipment, chemistries, and process solutions
- Analyze large physical and electrical datasets and communicate clear recommendations
...
Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD or MS with 4+ years of semiconductor experience in materials or process development
- Strong foundation in materials science, chemical reaction engineering, and thin film physics
- Hands‑on experience with patterning films such as photoresist, hard masks, and spacers
- Experience with ALD, CVD, PECVD, PE‑ALD, and/or LPCVD processes
- Knowledge of SPC and process maturity for manufacturable technologies
...
Preferred Qualifications:
...
- Experience developing thin films specifically for EUV patterning environments

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | Hirevector
highlights:
Artificial Intelligence -
...
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
impact (revenue growth,
...
reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
...
SaaS, or
...
Tech industries.
...
Familiarity with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or AI applications in content and market research workflows.
...
Experience with responsible AI frameworks, model governance, and AI regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF).
...
Track record of building AI developer platforms or shared ML infrastructure used by multiple product teams.
